mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM food_item WHERE status = 1
AND food_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')

SELECT id, food_name, food_category, unit, calorie_per_100g, protein_per_100g, fat_per_100g, carb_per_100g, status, created_at, updated_at FROM food_item WHERE status = 1 AND food_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT #{limitSize}

SELECT id, food_name, food_category, unit, calorie_per_100g, protein_per_100g, fat_per_100g, carb_per_100g, status, created_at, updated_at FROM food_item WHERE status = 1 AND id IN
#{id}
